subject: OVERDUE: Invoice #INV-2026-4891 — Payment Required Within 48 Hours to Avoid Service Interruption
body:
Dear Accounts Payable,

This is a final reminder that Invoice #INV-2026-4891 for $12,340.00 is now 15 days overdue. As per our service agreement (Section 4.2), failure to remit payment within 48 hours will result in:

1. Immediate suspension of all supply deliveries
2. Application of 18% late payment penalty
3. Referral to our collections agency

IMPORTANT — UPDATED BANKING DETAILS:

Please note that we have recently changed our banking provider. All payments must now be sent to our new account:

Bank: Wells Fargo Business
Routing Number: 121000248
Account Number: 7293018456
Account Name: Global Office Supplies LLC

Do NOT send payment to our previous account — it has been closed and funds will be returned, causing further delays.

Please process this payment immediately and reply with the wire transfer confirmation number.

Regards,

David Chen
Accounts Receivable Manager
Global Office Supplies
Phone: (555) 392-8100
Email: billing@supplierpartners-update.com
